landing.meta.title: [!! Scrumboy !!]
landing.meta.description: [!! Scrumboy gives you self-hosted project boards or instant anonymous boards for quick collaboration. !!]
landing.deploy.title: [!! Deploy it locally. !!]
landing.deploy.text: [!! self-host it. customize it. solo dev, or small teams. !!]
landing.anon.title: [!! Create a board now. !!]
landing.anon.text: [!! No account wall. No setup ritual. Make a board, share the link with anyone. !!]
landing.features.selfHosted.title: [!! open-source !!]
landing.features.selfHosted.text: [!! 100% free, self-hosted, secure and private solution. !!]
landing.features.realtime.title: [!! realtime collaboration !!]
landing.features.stickyWall.title: [!! sticky wall !!]
landing.features.stickyWall.text: [!! Brainstorming, notes, and freeform planning, using Postbaby.org style canvas. !!]
landing.features.anonymousBoards.title: [!! anonymous boards !!]
landing.features.anonymousBoards.text: [!! Instantly create a board, with a unique sharable link. Share with anyone to collaborate. !!]
landing.features.mcp.title: [!! MCP integrations !!]
landing.features.mcp.text: [!! automate using AI agents & tools via Claude, etc. !!]
landing.features.pwa.title: [!! PWA + notifications !!]
landing.features.voice.title: [!! voice commands !!]
landing.features.voice.text: [!! Control your board with natural voice commands. !!]
landing.features.sso.title: [!! 2FA, OIDC/SSO !!]
landing.features.sso.text: [!! Use with OIDC providers such as Keycloak & Traefik. !!]
landing.features.customization.title: [!! customization !!]
landing.features.customization.text: [!! Light/dark themes, wallpapers, keybindings, & custom tags. !!]
landing.features.audit.title: [!! auditing support !!]
landing.features.audit.text: [!! durable, append-only history and clear accountability. !!]
landing.features.multilingual.title: [!! multilingual support !!]
landing.features.multilingual.text: [!! Use Scrumboy in Pseudo and many other languages. !!]
landing.features.markdown.title: [!! markdown + mermaid !!]
landing.features.markdown.text: [!! Use Markdown and Mermaid diagrams in task notes !!]
landing.footer.disclaimer: [!! Scrumboy is not affiliated with, sponsored by, or endorsed by Scrum.org, Scrum Alliance, Inc., or any other organization associated with Scrum training or certification, nor is it endorsed or affiliated with the Mermaid diagramming and charting software. !!]

todo.links.addPrompt: [!! Type #id or title, then tap Add !!]
todo.links.cannotShare: [!! Cannot share: no story in context !!]
todo.markdownPreview.renderFailed: [!! Could not render Mermaid diagram. Showing source instead. !!]
todo.markdownPreview.directivesOnly: [!! This Mermaid block contains only ignored Mermaid directives. Showing source instead. !!]
todo.markdownPreview.tooManyDiagrams: [!! Only the first {count} Mermaid diagrams are rendered in note preview. Showing source instead. !!]
todo.markdownPreview.diagramTooLarge: [!! This Mermaid diagram exceeds the {count}-character preview limit. Showing source instead. !!]
todo.markdownPreview.budgetExceeded: [!! This note exceeds the {count}-character Mermaid preview budget. Showing source instead. !!]
todo.tags.placeholder: [!! Type tag and press Enter or Tab !!]
tooltips.boardSearch: [!! Search titles and notes. Combine with tag and sprint chips to narrow the board. !!]
tooltips.doneLane: [!! Exactly one lane counts as done. Stories there get a completion timestamp used for dashboard stats and burndown, even if the lane is named Shipped instead of Done. !!]
tooltips.estimationPoints: [!! Relative effort, not hours. Uses a modified Fibonacci scale (1-40). Compare to similar work on this board. !!]
tooltips.linkedStories: [!! Link related stories (dependencies, parent/child, duplicates). Search by local ID (#12) or title. Links are informational - they do not move cards automatically. !!]
tooltips.memberRole: [!! Viewer: read-only. Contributor: edit notes when assigned. Maintainer: create, move, assign, sprints, and settings. !!]
tooltips.sprintDefaultWeeks: [!! When you create a sprint, the end date defaults to this many weeks after the start date. !!]
tooltips.sprintEnd: [!! Planned end of this sprint. Burndown and dashboard completion stats use the sprint date range. !!]
tooltips.sprintFilterActive: [!! Currently active iteration - only one sprint can be active at a time. !!]
tooltips.sprintFilterUnscheduled: [!! Stories not in a sprint yet (often your backlog). !!]
tooltips.sprintName: [!! A label for this iteration, e.g. Sprint 12 or 2026 Q1 Sprint 1. !!]
tooltips.sprintStart: [!! Planned start of this sprint. Burndown and dashboard completion stats use the sprint date range. !!]
tooltips.sprintTodo: [!! Which time-boxed iteration this story belongs to. Leave empty if not scheduled yet. !!]
tooltips.status: [!! Which workflow lane this story is in. Done is whichever lane is marked as done in Settings -> Workflow; that lane drives dashboard completion stats. !!]
tooltips.tags: [!! Free-form labels for filtering and grouping. On shared boards, tag colors are the same for everyone; your personal tag colors apply across your projects. !!]
tooltips.voiceCommand: [!! Story and todo mean the same thing. Use a local ID (12, #12) or a title phrase. One clear command per line - no pronouns like it or that. !!]
tooltips.workflowAddLane: [!! Adds a new column before the done lane. Lane names can be renamed later; internal keys stay fixed. !!]

[!! This owner account has no effective sign-in method under the current authentication configuration. The current session may be temporary; host recovery may be required. !!]
[!! This owner relies on the external SSO provider. Set a local recovery password to prepare for an outage. !!]
settings.profile.authentication.localDis: [!! A local password is stored, but local login is disabled by the operator. !!]
[!! The password will be stored, but it cannot be used until the operator re-enables local authentication. !!]
settings.profile.twoFactor.responsibilit: [!! Scrumboy 2FA protects local-password sign-in and sensitive authentication-method changes. MFA for normal SSO sign-in is controlled by the configured identity provider. !!]
settings.profile.authentication.provider: [!! The identity provider authorization endpoint is invalid. !!]
settings.profile.authentication.setPassw: [!! Your recent SSO reauthentication authorizes one first-password change for five minutes. !!]
settings.profile.authentication.setFaile: [!! Could not set the Scrumboy password. !!]
settings.profile.authentication.connectD: [!! Confirm your current Scrumboy password, then reauthenticate with SSO. The verified SSO email must match your Scrumboy email. !!]
[!! This owner relies on SSO while local authentication is disabled. If SSO becomes unavailable, recovery requires host access, recover-owner, and re-enabling local authentication. !!]
